Title:
Login fails when username 
enters spaces before & after
Environment:
Browser: Chrome
OS: Windows
App: OrangeHRM Demo Site
URL: opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Enter " Admin " (with spaces after and before)
in the username field
2. Enter "admin123" in the password field
3. Click the Login button
4. Observe the error message displayed
Expected Result:
App should trim the spaces 
automatically and log the 
user in  successfully
Attachment:
Screenshot of error message showing 
"Invalid Credentials" after entering 
" Admin " with spaces

Title:
Entering spaces in Employee Name 
field shows "Invalid Parameter" error 
instead of a user friendly message
Environment:
Browser: Chrome
OS: Windows
App: OrangeHRM Demo Site
URL: opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Enter " " (space) in the emp name field
2. Click on search
3. Observe the error message displayed
Expected Result:
Validation message should 
be displayed or all records 
should be shown
Attachment:
Screenshot of error message showing 
"Invalid Parameter" after entering 
" "  (space) in emp name field

Title:
Employee name field accepts numeric 
values and special characters
Environment:
Browser: Chrome
OS: Windows
App: OrangeHRM Demo Site
URL: opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to PIM → Add Employee
2. Enter "12345" in First Name field
3. Enter "@#$" in Last Name field
4. Click Save button
5. Observe that employee is saved successfully
Expected Result:
App should show validation error  
"Only alphabets are allowed in name fields"
and should NOT save the employee
Actual Result:
App accepted numeric and special 
characters and saved the employee 
record successfully
Attachment: Screenshot of accepting the emp details
